titleStmt.title: SII 28.263: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 263. (A.R. No. 417 of 1913.) ĀṞAGAḶŪR, ATTUR TALUK, SALEM DISTRICT.

summary.p: Kāmēśvara temple, maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine, south wall.

Records the sale of the village Ilattipāḍi, along with the wet and dry land, in it as well as the irrigation tanks (ēndal) pertaining, with all rights (uṟimaigaḷ) for a consideration of 135 poṉ to the temple of Tirukkāmīśvaram-uḍaiya-nāyanār, the God of Āṟakaḷūr in Āṟṟūr-kūṟṟam, by Malaiyanuḍaiyāṉ chembai-āḻvāṉ. It is stated that the village Illatipāḍi was the kāṇi of Malaiyanuḍaiyāṉ. In the transaction of the temple was represented by śrī-māhēsvara-kaṇkāṇi, dēva-kanmi and kōyiṟ-kaṇakkar. (See No. 262 above).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅ
ka coḻatevarkku patiṉmuṉṟāvatu Āṟṟūr kūṟṟattu
Āṟukaḷūruṭaiyār tirukkāmicuramuṭaiya nāyanārkku
Ikkoyilil cimākecurakaṇkāṇi tevakanmi ko
yiṟ kaṇakkaṟku malaiyanuṭaiyāṉ cempai Āḻvāne
n Enkāṇiyāṉa Ilattipāṭi nānkellaikkuḷpaṭ
ṭa naṉcey puṉcey Entalkaḷumuṭpaṭa In ṉāyanāṟkku viṟ
ṟu nāṉ paṟṟina poṉ 100 3 10 5 Ippoṉ nūṟṟu muppatta
ñcum paṟṟi Eṉkāṇiyāṉa Ilattipāṭi Eṟpeṟpaṭṭa
Urimaikaḷum Innāyanārkku kuṭutten Ikkoili
l cimākecurakkaṇkāṇi tevakanmi koyil kaṇakka
ṟku malaiyanuṭaiyān cempai Āḻvāneṉ Ivai Eṉ Eḻu
ttu Ippaṭiyaṟiveṉ vempāruṭaiyāṉ muppuḷiyā
ṇa E
Digital edition of SII 28.263 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
